reviews.review_description: If I could give this game a negative number of stars I would.  I own over 800 games, and this has got to be one of the worst.  The photos they show in the Meta Store of many different species of dinosaurs looks great, but when you get into the game, there is only one species, (not even in their photos) and everything looks like and plays like it was created by a five-year-old.  I know this game is still being created, but this is so bad that it should NOT be out there to buy, even at free I would not be playing it again. There were Ankylosaurus dinosaurs up, floating in the sky and this was the ONLY dino in the game.  The advertisement had several species shown and none were there. I spent over and hour searching the map, but the Ankylosaurus just kept showing up over and over.
